# Lavro

> Personal portfolio website of Lavro, an international student focused on graphic design and creative development.

## About

Lavro is a student specializing in graphic design and creative web development. This site showcases interactive projects, character design pages, and contact information.

## Projects

- [Character Forge](https://lavro.org/CForge/): Character building and data core logic tool with multi-step creation and export.
- [Life Simulator](https://lavro.org/LSimulator/): Branching event simulation game exploring different life choices.
- [Alberina - D&D Character](https://lavro.org/DnD/Alberina/): Dungeons & Dragons character design showcase.
- [Flavilar - D&D Character](https://lavro.org/DnD/Flavilar/): D&D character visual packaging practice.

## Contact

- Email: Lavro@lavro.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/Lavr0v0
- Steam: https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199125299095/
